profession: Trader and Diplomat of the Interstellar Merchant Guilds
stance: Neutral but opportunistic in galactic commerce, with a keen eye for profit amid
vita: As an adept member of the Vor'Tak species known as traders and diplomats across star systems, I have navigated through numerous wars to ensure safe passage. My life is dedicated to bartering in turbulent times; my mindset remains open yet cautious.
portrait_prompt: A sophisticated Vor'Tak trader with a sleek silver-scaled skin, standing proudly amidst floating markets of the Andromeda sector. Wide eyes scan for opportunities in star maps and trade routes on transparent backgrounds.
